signals.title: Shell execution capability detected
signals.description: The entity can execute local commands or delegates to a local process.

signals.title: Remote endpoint capability detected
signals.description: The entity uses a remote endpoint that can receive data, provide tools or influence agent behavior.

signals.title: Credential reference detected
signals.description: The entity references credentials, tokens or environment variables.

signals.title: Filesystem write capability detected
signals.description: The entity can write to local files or delegates to a tool that can write to local files.

signals.title: Active maintenance
signals.description: The repository appears actively maintained based on recent commits, releases or issue activity.

signals.title: Verified or recognizable organization
signals.description: The maintainer is a verified or recognizable organization with public history.

signals.title: Transparent permission documentation
signals.description: The project explains what permissions, tools, credentials or network endpoints it uses.

signals.title: Pinned or signed release available
signals.description: The entity can be installed from a pinned version, release artifact or signed package.

signals.title: Negative community report
signals.description: Community discussion reports suspicious behavior, hidden downloads, unexpected shell usage or credential exposure.

signals.title: Manually reviewed alternative
signals.description: A recommendation or alternative has been manually reviewed against the current taxonomy.
